scenarios.task: Which pawn is a PASSED PAWN? Tap it!
scenarios.hint: No enemy pawns on same or adjacent files in front!
scenarios.exp: D5 is passed! No Black pawn can stop it!

scenarios.task: Tap where the D7 pawn should go to promote!
scenarios.hint: Pawns promote on the last rank!

scenarios.task: Who promotes first — White D4 or Black D6?
scenarios.q: Does White win this pawn race?
scenarios.exp: Yes! White promotes in 4 moves, Black needs 5!

scenarios.task: Are connected A+B pawns stronger than isolated ones?
scenarios.q: Are connected pawns stronger than isolated?
scenarios.exp: Yes! Connected pawns defend each other!
